# Skill: Release Readiness Check

## Purpose
Confirm go/no-go for pilot or release.

## Checklist
- Critical stories complete and accepted
- Mandatory tests green
- Defect backlog under threshold
- Security gate passed
- Runbook current
- Rollback path validated

## Output
- `go` or `no-go`
- blockers list
- owner and ETA per blocker
